Footer.aboutText: A Santa Barbara, Oxnard & Ventura professional group of lawyers specializing in Personal injury, Vehicular Accidents, Wrongful Death and Workers’ Compensation cases.

Hero.description: The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo delivers elite defense strategies with <precision>surgical precision</precision> and bilingual expertise.
Hero.ariaCall: Call Osbelia Castillo for a Free Consultation at 805-283-7656
Hero.ariaSubmit: Submit your request for a free legal consultation

About.title: About Osbelia Castillo
About.p1: For over five years, Osbelia has worked as an aggressive civil litigator representing insurance companies in both state and federal court. She has handled hundreds of personal injury cases including catastrophic injuries, wrongful deaths, and complex liability cases.
About.p2: Her experience representing insurance companies gives her an <edge>edge</edge> when fighting for her injured clients. Her background on the defense side provides a unique perspective to achieve favorable results at an early stage.
About.ariaProfile: View the full legal profile and biography of Osbelia Castillo

PracticeAreas.title: Practice Areas
PracticeAreas.subtitle: Dedicated to your recovery.
PracticeAreas.piDesc: Handling catastrophic injuries with an aggressive approach to secure the compensation you deserve.
PracticeAreas.vaDesc: Expert representation for highway collisions, side-street accidents, and complex parking lot cases.
PracticeAreas.wdDesc: Compassionate legal support for families seeking justice after the loss of a loved one due to negligence.
PracticeAreas.wcDesc: Protecting your right to a safe workplace and ensuring full benefits for on-the-job injuries.

Contact.description: We take the time to examine every detail of your case. Let us guide you through your legal options with clarity and dedication.

Process.title: Defining Goals, Method & Success Together
Process.p1: By conducting various internal investigation activities and implementing risk management assessments, our approach saves our clients time and money over the long term.
Process.p2: Organically grow the holistic world view of disruptive innovation via workplace diversity and empowerment.

metadata.title: Osbelia Castillo | Founding Attorney | Personal Injury Specialist
metadata.description: Meet Osbelia Castillo, founding attorney of The Law Office of Osbelia Castillo. With over 5 years of experience in civil litigation and insurance defense, she fights for maximum recovery for personal injury victims. Bilingual advocacy in English and Spanish.

hero.quote: Having seen how insurance companies defend claims from the inside, I now use that knowledge to fight for the maximum recovery for my clients.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.p1: For over five years, Osbelia has worked as an aggressive civil litigator representing insurance companies in both state and federal court. She has handled hundreds of personal injury cases including catastrophic injuries, wrongful deaths, and complex liability cases.
profile.p2: Her experience representing insurance companies gives her an <edge>edge</edge> when fighting for her injured clients. Her background on the defense side provides a unique perspective to achieve favorable results at an early stage.

common.insuranceExpertiseDesc: We anticipate insurance company tactics to prevent common claim denial strategies.
common.maximumRecoveryDesc: Meticulous case preparation designed to secure the highest possible settlements.

metadata.title: Personal Injury Law Specialists | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured due to someone else's negligence? We specialize in personal injury law, representing victims in slip and fall, dog bites, and catastrophic injury cases. defense-side insights to every plaintiff's case. Free consultation.

hero.title: Personal Injury
hero.subtitle: Law Specialists
hero.description: Recovering compensation for those injured by negligence. We bring defense-side insights to every plaintiff's case.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Leading Personal Injury Law Specialist in Santa Barbara

metadata.description: Specialized legal representation for car, truck, motorcycle, and pedestrian accidents. We investigate thoroughly to secure maximum compensation for your injuries.

hero.title: Vehicle
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Aggressive litigation for car, truck, motorcycle, and pedestrian accidents. We secure the compensation you need to move forward.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert Vehicle Accident Representation

categories.title: Specialized Accident Categories
categories.cellPhone: Accidents Due to Cell Phone Use

investigation.title: Meticulous Investigation
investigation.desc: We go beyond the police report, using accident reconstruction experts and digital forensics to establish liability in complex vehicle collision cases.

metadata.title: Wrongful Death Attorneys | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Navigating the loss of a loved one is devastating. Our wrongful death lawyers provide compassionate advocacy and aggressive legal representation to secure your family's future. Free consultation.

hero.title: Wrongful
hero.subtitle: Death Claims
hero.description: Seeking justice for families navigating unimaginable loss. We fight for your future while you focus on healing.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Compassionate Representative for Wrongful Death Claims

future.title: Securing Your Family's Future
future.description: While no amount of money can replace a loved one, a wrongful death claim can provide the financial security your family needs to survive and thrive following a tragic loss.
future.survivalDesc: Claims for the victim's pre-death suffering.
future.consortiumDesc: Justice for the loss of companionship and care.
future.earningsDesc: Recovering future income lost due to the death.
future.funeralDesc: Coverage for final medical and burial expenses.

litigation.title: Aggressive Litigation
litigation.desc: We use our insurance industry knowledge to hold negligent parties accountable, ensuring they pay the full value for the life they've affected.
litigation.ariaCall: Contact Osbelia Castillo for support with a wrongful death claim

metadata.title: Workers' Compensation Lawyers | Santa Barbara | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured at work? Our California workers' compensation attorneys protect your rights and ensure you receive maximum medical and financial benefits. Free consultation.

hero.title: Workplace
hero.subtitle: Injuries
hero.description: Protecting your rights and livelihood. We ensure you get the full medical and financial benefits you deserve under California law.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Expert in California Workers' Compensation Law

benefits.title: Workers' Compensation Benefits
benefits.description: The workers' comp system is complex and often skewed in favor of employers. We rebalance the scales to ensure you receive full coverage for your workplace injuries.
benefits.lostWagesDesc: Compensation for time off work during recovery.
benefits.medicalCareDesc: Full coverage for surgery, therapy, and medications.
benefits.retrainingDesc: Vouchers for new skill training if you can't return to the same role.

filing.title: Filing Your Claim
filing.description: Timing is critical in workers' compensation cases. Follow these steps to protect your claim:
filing.step1: Report the injury to your employer immediately.
filing.step2: Seek medical evaluation from a certified provider.
filing.step3: Contact our office to file a formal DWC-1 form.
filing.step4: Document all symptoms and treatment interactions.

metadata.title: Asbestos & Mesothelioma Litigation | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Expert legal advocacy for victims of asbestos exposure. We hold corporations accountable for occupational health failures. Free consultation.

hero.title: Asbestos &
hero.subtitle: Mesothelioma
hero.description: Maximum advocacy for victims of environmental toxins. We hold industrial and corporate entities accountable for failures to protect workers and families.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Asbestos & Mesothelioma Litigation Expert

content.title: Justice for Occupational Exposure
content.description: Exposure to asbestos can lead to devastating health conditions, often appearing decades after the truth was hidden by employers and manufacturers. We understand the specialized nature of mesothelioma claims and fight for the resources your family needs.
content.trustClaimsDesc: Expediting recovery through established bankruptcy trusts of responsible corporations.
content.specialistAccessDesc: Connecting victims with leading oncologists and pulmonary experts for diagnosis and care.
content.industrialNegligenceDesc: Holding construction and manufacturing companies responsible for unsafe working conditions.
content.lifetimeAdvocacyDesc: Ensuring long-term settlements that cover extensive medical needs and loss of consortium.
content.corporateLitigationDesc: Mesothelioma cases are highly technical. We have the experience and expert network required to handle the complex evidentiary standards of toxic tort law.

metadata.title: Brain & Spinal Injury Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Catastrophic injuries require expert legal representation. We fight for the long-term care and financial security your family deserves. Free consultation.

hero.title: Brain &
hero.subtitle: Spinal Injury
hero.description: Life-altering injuries require dedicated advocacy. We fight to secure the long-term care and financial resources your family needs for the road ahead.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Catastrophic Brain & Spinal Injury Specialist

content.title: Compassionate Advocacy for Serious Trauma
content.description: Brain and spinal cord injuries often involve permanent changes to one's quality of life. Our firm understands the medical complexities and the lifelong costs associated with these catastrophic events.
content.tbiDesc: Representation for concussions, cognitive impairment, and severe cranial trauma.
content.spinalDamageDesc: Fighting for victims of paralysis, nerve damage, and chronic spinal conditions.
content.longTermCareDesc: Ensuring settlements cover future rehabilitation, nursing, and medical equipment.
content.maximumRecoveryDesc: Relentless pursuit of compensation for pain, suffering, and lost earning capacity.
content.pursuitOfJusticeDesc: We leverage medical experts and life-care planners to build a case that accurately reflects the true cost of your injury.

metadata.title: Defective Product Liability Attorneys | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured by a dangerous product? We take on major corporations to recover damages for manufacturing and design defects. Free consultation.

hero.title: Defective
hero.subtitle: Products
hero.description: When corporations put profits over people, we hold them accountable. Our firm handles complex product liability cases to recover damages for injuries caused by unsafe consumer goods.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Defective Products & Liability Specialist

content.title: Justice for Unsafe Products
content.description: When you buy a product, you have the right to expect it is safe for its intended use. Whether it's a defective auto part, a dangerous household appliance, or unsafe medication, we take on the large corporations responsible for your harm.
content.strictLiabilityDesc: Holding manufacturers responsible for design and manufacturing defects.
content.consumerSafetyDesc: Fighting against dangerous products that lack proper safety warnings.
content.autoPartFailureDesc: Cases involving defective airbags, tires, and mechanical failures.
content.corporateAccountabilityDesc: Proving that a company knew of defects but failed to issue a recall.
content.commitmentDesc: Pharmaceutical companies and manufacturers have a duty to ensure their products don't harm consumers. We hold them accountable when they prioritize profits over patient safety.

metadata.title: Dog Bite Injury Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: California strict liability laws protect victims of dog bites. We secure compensation for medical care and emotional trauma. Free consultation.

hero.title: Dog Bite
hero.subtitle: Injuries
hero.description: Holding owners accountable for animal attacks. We specialize in securing compensation for the physical and emotional trauma caused by dog bites.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Dog Bite Injury Law Specialist

content.title: Strict Liability for Dog Bites
content.description: California law follows a strict liability rule for dog bites. This means owners are responsible for the injuries their pets cause, regardless of whether the dog has bitten before. We help you navigate the claims process against homeowners' insurance to cover your recovery.
content.scarringDesc: Advocating for victims who require plastic surgery or long-term wound care.
content.statewideLiabilityDesc: Leveraging California's clear laws to hold animal owners fully accountable.
content.emotionalTraumaDesc: Fighting for compensation for the psychological impact and fear often caused by attacks.
content.infectionDesc: Ensuring your settlement covers all medical treatments, including specialized therapy.
content.protectRecoveryDesc: Animal attacks are frightening and can lead to permanent damage. We are here to manage the insurance companies so you can focus on healing.

metadata.title: Sexual Abuse & Molestation Attorneys | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Compassionate and confidential legal advocacy for survivors of abuse and institutional neglect. We fight for your restoration and justice.

hero.title: Sexual Abuse &
hero.subtitle: Molestation
hero.description: Gentle yet aggressive pursuit of justice. We provide a safe space and powerful legal protection for survivors of abuse and institutional neglect.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Compassionate Advocate for Abuse Survivors

content.title: Holding Institutions Accountable
content.description: Beyond the abuser, institutions like schools, religious organizations, and workplaces often bear responsibility for failing to prevent harm. We are dedicated to holding these powerful entities accountable and securing the resources survivors need for healing and restoration.
content.institutionalNegligenceDesc: Holding organizations responsible for negligent hiring, supervision, and failures to act.
content.civilJusticeDesc: Leveraging the civil court system to achieve the financial restoration and closure the criminal system may lack.
content.confidentialityFirstDesc: Strict adherence to privacy and survivor-centered legal strategies to protect your identity.
content.powerfulProtectionDesc: Aggressive litigation to ensure survivors are not silenced and their voices are heard.
content.pathRestorationDesc: You don't have to face this alone. We provide the legal strength and personal empathy required to navigate these difficult cases.
content.ariaCall: Confidential contact for sexual abuse and molestation survivors

metadata.title: Slip and Fall Accident Attorneys | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured on someone else's property? Our Santa Barbara slip and fall lawyers hold negligent property owners accountable. Free consultation.

hero.title: Slip and Fall
hero.subtitle: Accident Attorneys
hero.description: Recovering justice for premises liability victims in Santa Barbara, Oxnard, and Ventura.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Slip and Fall & Premises Liability Law Expert

content.title: Premises Liability
content.description: Premises liability arises when an injury is caused by an unsafe or defective condition on someone's property. Owners have the legal duty to keep their property safe for visitors.
content.provingNegligenceDesc: To win a compensation claim, we must demonstrate that the property owner knew or should have known about the dangerous condition and failed to address it.
content.establishOwner: Establishing the property owner created the condition.
content.proveKnowledge: Proving actual knowledge of the defect.

metadata.title: Bicycle Accident Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured while cycling? Our Santa Barbara bicycle accident attorneys protect your rights and fight for full settlement from negligent drivers.

hero.title: Bicycle
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Cyclists deserve safety on every road. We represent riders injured by negligent drivers, securing the resources needed for your recovery.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Advocate for Bicycle Accident Victims

content.title: Standing Up for Cyclists
content.description: Bicycle accidents often involve unique legal considerations, including roadway design, helmet laws, and driver visibility. We have the expertise to prove driver negligence in complex cyclist injury cases.
content.roadwayAdvocacyDesc: Holding drivers accountable for failing to share the road or violating bike lane laws.
content.medicalSupportDesc: Ensuring you receive top-tier medical care for fractures, head trauma, or road rash.
content.liabilityFocusDesc: Proving driver distraction or failure to yield as the primary cause of the collision.
content.maximumRecoveryDesc: Seeking compensation for lost wages, medical equipment, and rehabilitation.

metadata.title: Distracted Driving Accident Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Cell phone use causes devastating accidents. We hold distracted drivers accountable and secure compensation for your injuries. Free consultation.

hero.title: Cell Phone Use
hero.subtitle: Negligence
hero.description: Distracted driving is a choice that leads to tragedy. We hold drivers accountable for endangering others by prioritizing their screens over the road.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Distracted Driving Negligence Specialist

content.title: Combating Distracted Driving
content.description: Cell phone use including texting, calling without hands-free devices, or using apps while driving is a primary cause of serious accidents today. We specialize in uncovering the evidence needed to prove digital distraction.
content.forensicsDesc: Subpoenaing phone records and analyzing data timestamps to prove phone use during the collision.
content.highImpactDesc: Proving gross negligence when drivers intentionally violate distracted driving laws.
content.victimRightsDesc: Ensuring you receive full compensation for medical treatment, property damage, and trauma.
content.handsFreeDesc: Identifying when drivers failed to use legally required safety equipment.

metadata.title: Drunk Driving Accident Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Victim of a DUI crash? We hold intoxicated drivers accountable for their reckless choices and fight for your maximum recovery. Free consultation.

hero.title: Drunk Driving
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Holding negligent drivers accountable for reckless choices. We fight for justice and maximum recovery for victims of DUI collisions.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - DUI Accident & Reckless Negligence Specialist

content.title: Justice for DUI Victims
content.description: When a driver chooses to operate a vehicle under the influence, they are making a choice that endangers everyone on the road. We are committed to securing the compensation you deserve for your injuries and losses.
content.punitiveDesc: Seeking additional compensation to punish reckless behavior and deter future incidents.
content.criminalCivilDesc: Understanding how a DUI criminal case impacts your personal injury claim.
content.fullLiabilityDesc: Holding the intoxicated driver fully responsible for all medical costs and lost wages.
content.proofDesc: Using police reports, blood alcohol tests, and eyewitness accounts to build a solid case.
content.whyHireDesc: Drunk driving cases require a specific legal strategy to maximize recovery. We have the experience to navigate both the civil and criminal implications of your accident.

metadata.title: Hit and Run Accident Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Driver fled the scene? We use every resource to track down responsible parties and maximize your uninsured motorist recovery. Free consultation.

hero.title: Hit and Run
hero.subtitle: Claims
hero.description: When a driver flees the scene, they leave behind more than just damage. We use every resource to track down responsible parties and secure your recovery.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Hit and Run Claims Specialist

content.title: Your Path to Recovery After a Hit and Run
content.description: A hit and run accident can feel overwhelming and hopeless. However, there are multiple avenues for recovery, including uninsured motorist coverage and thorough investigations to locate the fleeing driver.
content.investigationDesc: Working with private investigators and surveillance footage to identify the vehicle and driver.
content.umClaimsDesc: Maximizing your own insurance policy's uninsured motorist benefits when the driver remains unknown.
content.criminalChargesDesc: Coordinating with law enforcement to support criminal hit and run prosecutions.
content.fullDamagesDesc: Seeking compensation for medical bills, pain and suffering, and property damage.

metadata.title: Motorcycle Accident Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Injured on a motorcycle? We provide aggressive representation to overcome bias and recover the full compensation riders deserve. Free consultation.

hero.title: Motorcycle
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Riders face unique risks on the road. We provide aggressive representation to protect your rights and recover compensation for serious motorcycle injuries.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Motorcycle Accident Specialist

content.title: Protecting the Rights of Motorcyclists
content.description: Motorcycle accidents often result in severe, life-altering injuries due to the lack of protection for the rider. We understand the bias riders often face and fight to ensure you are treated fairly by insurance companies.
content.advocacyDesc: Combating the negative stereotypes associated with motorcyclists to prove driver error.
content.expertiseDesc: Specializing in cases involving road rash, broken bones, and head injuries.
content.defenseDesc: Proving that the other driver's failure to see or respect your lane caused the accident.
content.futureCostsDesc: Calculating long-term rehabilitation and medical expenses for severe bike accidents.

metadata.title: Pedestrian Accident Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Protecting those on foot. We hold negligent drivers accountable for failing to yield and violating pedestrian right-of-way. Free consultation.

hero.title: Pedestrian
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Protecting those on foot. We hold negligent drivers accountable for failing to yield and violating a pedestrian's right of way.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Pedestrian Accident Specialist

content.title: Justice for Injured Pedestrians
content.description: Pedestrians are the most vulnerable group on the road. When a driver fails to yield the right-of-way or drives distracted, the results are often catastrophic. We are here to help you navigate the legal system and recover.
content.dutyDesc: Proving that the driver violated their elevated duty of care toward pedestrians.
content.advocacyDesc: Helping you secure immediate expert care for severe orthopedic and head injuries.
content.violationsDesc: Investigating intersection and crosswalk collisions where drivers failed to yield.
content.settlementDesc: Aggressively pursuing the highest possible recovery for your pain and losses.

metadata.title: Truck Accident & Commercial Crash Lawyers | Osbelia Castillo
metadata.description: Commercial trucking accidents involve complex federal regulations. We hold trucking companies accountable for negligence and safety violations. Free consultation.

hero.title: Truck
hero.subtitle: Accidents
hero.description: Commercial crashes involve complex regulations and powerful insurance companies. We level the playing field for victims of trucking company negligence.
hero.alt: Attorney Osbelia Castillo - Commercial Truck Accident & FMCSA Regulation Specialist

content.title: Holding Commercial Trucking Accountable
content.description: 18-wheelers and commercial vehicles are subject to strict state and federal safety regulations. We investigate driver logs, maintenance records, and company hiring practices to prove liability.
content.complianceDesc: Checking violations of Federal Motor Carrier Safety Administration hours-of-service rules.
content.liabilityDesc: Holding the entire trucking company responsible for their driver's actions and oversights.
content.auditsDesc: Exposing falsified logs used to cover up driver fatigue and excessive driving hours.
content.recoveryDesc: Securing resources for long-term care required after high-impact commercial collisions.
